signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains a reduced-size short lean because price is still down while open interest is still slightly rising, which is consistent with fresh shorts pressing.
LIT is one of the cleaner shorts because the tape is weak and fresh shorts are still pressing while open interest continues to build.
DASH is the clearest short on this board because price is down hard while open interest is still rising, which suggests the selloff is not fully exhausted yet.
BLUR is too mixed and too low-liquidity to justify a serious fresh trade in this tape.
MON remains a reduced-size short because it is still weak and funding is still positive, which keeps the downside pressure intact.
HEMI remains a fade because funding is still extremely positive even after the weakness, which leaves the long side crowded.
ETHFI is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
ZEN is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
PURR is already down hard and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
